event: Study of a Woman in Prayer or Contemplation
symbols: upward gaze — longing, spiritual aspiration, or appeal to a higher power
bare shoulders — vulnerability and exposure of the soul
flowing dark hair — femininity and natural beauty
description: A pencil or chalk drawing of a young woman shown from the bust upward in three-quarter profile facing right. Her dark hair flows loosely behind her. She gazes upward with parted lips and an expression of intense longing or devotion. Her hands are clasped together at her chest. Her shoulders are bare. The background is plain and warm-toned.

_meta.title: Study of Guinevere for Sir Lancelot in the Queen`s Chamber
